title: The No-Nonsense Guide to Accepting Bitcoin for Ebook Sales
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a digital creator stuck in a foreign land, unable to sell your ebooks due to PayPal restrictions in Nigeria. Or perhaps you're a US-based artist trying to bypass Gumroad's fees. Whatever the reason, you're about to find out how to sell your digital products without breaking the bank – or your creator spirit. In this no-nonsense guide, we'll show you exactly how to start selling ebooks using cryptocurrency, even with the toughest restrictions. From setting up your pipeline to making that first sale, we've got you covered.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

Traditional payment processors like PayPal and Gumroad often come with restrictive terms, crippling your ability to sell to specific countries or regions. Cryptocurrency, on the other hand, offers a decentralized and borderless payment system. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can integrate multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds, allowing buyers to pay in over 300 coins, including BTC, ETH, and USDT. This means you can focus on creating, not worrying about payment restrictions.
What You Need Before You Start

Before diving in, you'll need a few essential tools: Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) for frontend wallet integration, NOWPayments for a seamless payment processing experience, and a solid understanding of cryptocurrency basics. Don't worry if you're new to crypto – our guide will walk you through the process. Make sure you have access to a digital wallet and a basic understanding of wallet security.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

The first step is to set up your payment pipeline using NOWPayments. This will allow buyers to pay in cryptocurrency, which will be converted to USD at the time of transaction. Next, integrate Web3 Wallet Connect to enable frontend wallet functionality, complete with multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds. This will give buyers a seamless payment experience. Finally, set up automated delivery for your ebooks using the Core Shop Engine, so buyers can access their purchases instantly.
Cryptocurrency payment processors offer a borderless payment system.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Now it's time to go live! Set up your shop using the Core Shop Engine, and configure your payment and delivery pipeline. Make sure to test your system thoroughly to avoid any hiccups. Once you're confident, promote your shop on social media and forums where your target audience hangs out. As your first sale comes in, celebrate – you've overcome the hurdles of traditional payment processors and are now selling ebooks like a pro!
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once your system is up and running, it's time to scale. Analyze your sales data to identify trends and optimize your marketing efforts. Consider offering discounts or promotions to incentivize more sales. As your shop grows, you may want to explore additional features like subscription-based services or exclusive content. The key is to stay flexible and adapt to the needs of your customers.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Automated delivery ensures buyers get instant access to their purchases.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking to sell ebooks without PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad, or if you want to create a digital download store that accepts cryptocurrency only, you're in the right place. Check out our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see how Web3 Wallet Connect can help you create a seamless payment experience for your customers.
Your Action Checklist

Create a digital wallet and set up a basic understanding of wallet security. Integrate NOWPayments for cryptocurrency payments and Web3 Wallet Connect for frontend wallet functionality. Set up automated delivery using the Core Shop Engine. Test your system thoroughly before going live. Promote your shop on social media and forums where your target audience hangs out. Analyze your sales data to optimize marketing efforts and scale your shop.
Scaling your shop requires analyzing sales data and adapting to customer needs.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
